headline: A Look At U.S. Bancorp (USB) Valuation As Fidelity Partnership Promises Efficiency Gains
summary: What U.S. Bancorp’s Recent Returns Tell You U.S. Bancorp (USB) has traded around recent U.S. bank sector sentiment, with the stock showing a 1.4% daily gain and a 1.7% move over the past week, but a weaker month. See our latest analysis for U.S. Bancorp. At a share price of $52.75, U.S. Bancorp’s recent 1-day and 7-day share price gains sit against a weaker 1-month and year to date share price return.
